style_locks: Use warm earth brown, old wood brown, herb green, ash gray, old white stone, and controlled firelight; do not collapse the frame into all gray-black.
Fire smoke lowers contrast but must not swallow silhouettes.
Low magic is only a weak broken gold-red glint from the half token, not a beam, weapon, or full door reveal.
Reference frame must keep foreground/midground/background separation and avoid full-frame equal detail.
qc_rejection_rules: Reject if Luo Qinghe appears as a present living figure.
Reject if the slave soldier reads as a pure insect monster, official, or Bai Yi.
Reject if the hidden doorway becomes a completed glowing magic portal.
Reject if distant debris, smoke, or stones become noisy particles or equal-detail microtexture.
Reject if modern objects, readable text, UI, watermark, or random symbols appear.
